meaning_english: A thing belonging to a period other than that in which it exists.
A nation or person engaged in war or conflict.
A harsh, discordant mixture of sounds.
A person displaying aggressive or exaggerated patriotism or group loyalty.

meaning_kannada: ಕಲೆ ಅಥವಾ ಜ್ಞಾನದಲ್ಲಿ ಆಳವಿಲ್ಲದ ಆಸಕ್ತಿ ಹೊಂದಿರುವವನು
meaning_english: A person who cultivates an area of interest without real commitment or knowledge.
The skill of clear and expressive speech.
Lasting for a very short time.
A phrase or words written in memory of a person who has died, especially on a tombstone.
To officially absolve someone from blame or a fault.
A person who enjoys eating and often eats too much.
A person who believes that the pursuit of pleasure is the most important thing in life.

meaning_kannada: ತನ್ನ ಆರೋಗ್ಯದ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಸದಾ ಅತೀವ ಚಿಂತಿತನಾಗಿರುವವನು
meaning_english: A person who is abnormally anxious about their health.
Having one's true identity concealed.

meaning_kannada: ರಾಜ್ಯಾಂತರ ಕಾಲ (ಇಬ್ಬರು ರಾಜರ ಆಳ್ವಿಕೆಯ ನಡುವಿನ ಬಿಡುವು)
meaning_english: A period when normal government is suspended, especially between successive reigns.
A person who travels from place to place, typically for work.
The most important work of an artist, writer, or composer.
Carried out in bad faith; dishonest.
No longer produced or used; out of date.
A solution or remedy for all difficulties or diseases.
A relationship that is purely spiritual and not physical.
A fictitious name, especially one used by an author.

meaning_kannada: ಕೋರಂ (ಸಭೆ ನಡೆಸಲು ಬೇಕಾದ ಕನಿಷ್ಠ ಸದಸ್ಯರ ಸಂಖ್ಯೆ)
meaning_english: The minimum number of members that must be present to make a meeting's proceedings valid.
The existing state of affairs, especially regarding social issues.
A person who can endure pain or hardship without showing their feelings.
A student who stays away from school without leave or explanation.
A person who lends money at unreasonably high rates of interest.
A decision on an issue of fact in a civil or criminal case.
Dislike of or prejudice against people from other countries.
The scientific study of animals.
A sentence or statement that has a double meaning.
